creator: gsutter@pobox.com
text:
/usr/sbin/addgroup wants tclsh to run, but tcl is not part of the release!

Fix: 

Either:
	1.  Change addgroup to use an installed shell
	2.  Ensure that tcl is installed with the 2.2.5-RELEASE distribution.
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to run addgroup on a fresh FreeBSD 2.2.5-RELEASE installation.
